relations.note: Tinted-letter and colorway detail refines the base campaign headline treatment.
The lockup copy content applies alongside the headline typographic treatment.

quotes: Stack as three lines (YOU / DESERVE / MORE) in hero placements, left-aligned.
Set in **Agenda** (digital may use Agenda as live text for this headline only; email fallback: Nunito Sans ExtraBold).
Stack as three lines (YOU / DESERVE / MORE) in hero placements, left-aligned.

rules.intent: Preserve the locked campaign headline treatment.
rules.rule_text: The "YOU DESERVE MORE" campaign headline is set in Agenda (campaign_headline.font = Agenda) and is ALL CAPS always (campaign_headline.case = all_caps). Digital may use Agenda as live text for this headline only; the email fallback is Nunito Sans ExtraBold. In hero placements it is stacked as three lines (YOU / DESERVE / MORE) and left-aligned (campaign_headline.alignment = left).

quotes: set at approximately 40% tint** of the headline color
The letters **"D" (in DESERVE) and "M" (in MORE) are set at approximately 40% tint** of the headline color — a nod to the "d" and "m" of dermatomyositis.
Two approved colorways: brand **Gold/Sunshine** or **Brand Blue** (tinted letters at 40% of the same hue).

rules.intent: Encode the signature dermatomyositis letter-tint device and approved colorways.
rules.rule_text: The letters "D" (in DESERVE) and "M" (in MORE) are set at approximately 40% tint of the headline color (opacity.headline.letter_tint_40 = 0.4) — a nod to the "d" and "m" of dermatomyositis. Two approved colorways: brand Gold/Sunshine (#ffc60a/#faa31b) or Brand Blue (#00529b), with the tinted letters at 40% of the same hue.

effect.content: YOU DESERVE MORE. So there's LISRAYA—the first targeted treatment for dermatomyositis.

quotes: **YOU DESERVE MORE.** So there's LISRAYA—the first targeted treatment for dermatomyositis.
Full lockup copy: "**YOU DESERVE MORE.** So there's LISRAYA—the first targeted treatment for dermatomyositis."

rules.rule_text: The full campaign lockup copy must read verbatim: "YOU DESERVE MORE. So there's LISRAYA—the first targeted treatment for dermatomyositis."
